subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who knoweth, and hath taught mankind what He willeth. He, verily, is the One made manifest on the Day of Return. Glorified be He Who speaketh and causeth to speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من عرف و عرف الناس ما اراد انه لهو الظاهر فی یوم المعاد سبحان من نطق و انطق
